compatibility_flags.notes: Modified bitumen transition strip detail must be confirmed on IFC drawings.

compatibility_flags.zone_interface: Main Roof Field to Parapet Cap
compatibility_flags.notes: AVB transition membrane and termination bar required at all parapet interfaces.

risk_findings.description: Termination height below 200mm minimum at 3 locations per preliminary survey.
risk_findings.action_required: Revise parapet height detail or provide raised cant block assembly.

risk_findings.description: Slope-to-drain not confirmed at 1% minimum. Ponding risk flagged by civil.
risk_findings.action_required: Provide tapered insulation plan with positive drainage confirmation.

risk_findings.description: 25mm movement allowance not yet confirmed in joint detail.
risk_findings.action_required: Structural engineer to confirm movement range; update cover plate spec.

risk_findings.description: Wind zone uplift calculations pending. Fastener spacing may require tightening.
risk_findings.action_required: Submit FM Global or ASCE 7 uplift calc before IFC issue.
